data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — Created tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill-directive.sh with 6 test functions covering: /fix-bug triggers, /dso:fix-bug triggers, unrelated message no output, embedded slash command triggers, bare /fix-bug triggers, bare substring (no slash) produces no false positive. Field name confirmed as 'prompt' from official Claude Code docs.
